error: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'requests'
solution: Install the missing Python package using pip.

error: bash: python3: command not found
solution: Python 3 is not installed or not in PATH. Install it via your package manager.

error: permission denied
solution: The current user doesn't have execute permissions on the file.

error: ENOSPC: no space left on device
solution: Disk is full. Free space by clearing caches or old files.
command: df -h && sudo apt clean && docker system prune -f

error: ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:5432
solution: PostgreSQL is not running. Start the service.

error: npm ERR! ERESOLVE unable to resolve dependency tree
solution: Dependency conflict in node_modules. Force install with legacy peer deps.

error: ERROR [stage-0] RUN ssh-keyscan bitbucket.org >> /root/.ssh/known_hosts
solution: Docker build has no network or DNS during the RUN step, so ssh-keyscan fails. Use build network or pre-add known_hosts.
command: In Dockerfile: use --network=host for the build, or COPY a pre-scanned known_hosts file.

error: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'nosuchmodule'
solution: The module 'nosuchmodule' does not exist. This is a test entry to verify nova up KB lookup works correctly.
command: echo 'KB hit confirmed — nova up is working!'

error: kairos: az kubectl docker command not found after install
solution: Initial Kairos setup did not complete fully. Delete ~/.kairos and re-run kairos to trigger first-time setup again.

error: kairos cluster create fails immediately
solution: Tooling not installed or Azure login not completed. List and install all tools, then login to Azure.
command: kairos tools list && kairos tools install --all && az login --use-device-code

error: kairos WSL setup fails on my machine
solution: WSL integration or distro state is broken. Shut down WSL to reset networking and integration.

error: kairos missing app.json
solution: app.json was never generated. Run the app.json creation script from nga-local-dev. File must exist at ~/.kairos/app.json.
command: Run the app.json creation script from nga-local-dev

error: kairos CLI version shows old value after update
solution: app.json version mismatch. Re-run the creation script and update Kairos.

error: kairos cluster created but services don't start
solution: Cluster up does not mean services are healthy. List services and install any missing ones individually.

error: event-outbox install fails Kyverno webhook error
solution: Required CRDs (e.g. ServiceMonitor) are missing. Install the Prometheus/monitoring stack first before event-outbox.

error: cannot access local endpoints 127.0.0.1 nip.io cluster unreachable from browser
solution: WSL networking glitch. Shut down WSL to reset — the issue usually resolves without a full reinstall.

error: Azure Key Vault access fails during cluster create
solution: Missing Azure subscription access. Check which accounts are available and ensure you are on the correct subscription.

error: go mod download fails SSH port 22 blocked
solution: SSH port 22 is blocked on your network. Configure Git/SSH to use port 443 instead.

error: kairos local IAM token missing tenantId
solution: Local IAM always requires tenant context — tokens without tenantId are not supported. Each tenant is isolated by design.

error: kairos v0.6 broke older examples setup
solution: Kairos v0.6 transitioned from MongoDB to Postgres. Some docs and examples are outdated. Update your setup scripts to use Postgres.
